title: Binary file in releases
body: Hello, I’m trying to install Skopeo on AL2023, but it’s not very straightforward. Would it be possible to include the Skopeo binary file for different operating systems in future releases? That way, I could download it from the release page and it would be easier. 🙏🏻

comments.body: Thanks for reaching out. Linux distributions are not compatible enough to be able to provide a single full-featured binary, see e.g. https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1545 and past reports.
